case_title: VION HOLDINGS LLC VS. LOTTIE GARDNER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-05-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VION HOLDINGS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, LOTTIE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-16-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, ADR PACKAGE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VION HOLDINGS LLC SERVED OCT-22-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, LOTTIE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
